description_long: This is a small, stylized yacht with a white hull and a single black mast supporting a triangular sail. The sail features a yellow smiley face design, adding a playful touch to the vessel. The hull is compact and pixelated, with a slightly rounded bow and a flat stern, and small yellow details at the bow and stern. The deck is minimalistic, with no visible railings, seating, or cabin structures, emphasizing a simple open design. The mast is centrally positioned and topped with a yellow block, matching the color accents on the hull. The yacht sits on a flat gray base, suggesting it is intended as a display or model rather than a functional watercraft.
description: A small, white yacht with a black mast and a triangular sail featuring a yellow smiley face, accented with yellow details on the hull.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular sail with a yellow smiley face and the rounded bow of the yacht.
description_view_1: Direct bow view highlighting the narrow front profile and the central black mast.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the hull, the mast, and the sail with its yellow design.
description_view_3: Stern view showing the flat back of the hull and the yellow accent at the stern.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a pixelated, rounded bow and flat stern, white in color with small yellow accents at both ends. The hull is compact and lacks visible keels or chines.
attribute_deck_layout: The deck is open and minimalistic with no visible levels, cockpits, railings, or seating areas. The mast is centrally placed, and there are no notable deck fittings or equipment.
attribute_cabin_structure: No cabin structure is visible; the yacht features an open deck with no windows, doors, or enclosed spaces.
